description: Mod that lets you copy stuff.
name: PJUtils

categories.name: About
categories.content: PJUtils is mod that lets you copy information such as experience level. It is made for Minecraft 1.18 and requires fabric mod loader. You will also need fabric api to run the mod and for in-game configuration you will need cloth config API. The code is not currently on GitHub because I am dumb and git reset --hard it. I will try to revert that and publish my code soon.

categories.name: Showcase
categories.content: Here are some images I took. I hope you like them.
